attempts.insight: Iter-117 introduced the iff form when refactoring to presheaf shape without re-checking the converse direction. The converse requires `Subsingleton (Algebra.H1Cotangent A B)` (André–Quillen H¹ vanishing) which is not implied by local freeness of Ω alone. Mathlib's converse lemma `Algebra.IsStandardSmooth.of_basis_kaehlerDifferential` carries this as an explicit hypothesis. The forward direction is the only sound direction that drops from the Mathlib smoothness API; lossless because no project consumer used the iff backward.
